title: Grades
gradingScale: Grading Scale: A=90-100 â€¢ B=80-89 â€¢ C=70-79
projectionsDesc: Add hypothetical upcoming assessments to see projected GPA.
bulkImportDesc: Upload a grades CSV to add multiple assessments at once. Columns: Date, Subject, Assessment, Score, Possible, Weight.
gpaReportDesc: Export or print a detailed GPA report showing term breakdowns and projections.
performanceOverlay:
**Overall Performance**

**Term GPA** — This is the real weighted average of all your graded assessments, calculated according to each one's percentage weight.

**Projection** — Estimates your final grade if you maintain your current performance, using linear regression on your recent scores.

**Delta (± pts)** — The difference between your current average and the projection. Positive = you are improving; negative = you need to recover.

**Bar chart** — Each bar represents an assessment in chronological order. The last bar (darkest) is your most recent grade. The height reflects your normalized score.
masteryOverlay:
**Learning Mastery**

This radar illustrates your mastery level based on the spaced repetition algorithm of your *Flashcards*.

It visually shows in which areas or decks you are strongest and which need more attention and review.
projectionOverlay:
**Projection Simulator**

This graph shows how your GPA has evolved over time based on the actual weight of your submissions.

The **"Proj."** point (orange) mathematically simulates your new weighted average if you get the score you entered.
